description: This is a Java test source file using JUnit 5 and Spring Boot testing annotations. It contains test cases for the OfficerController, verifying security access, response correctness, and service interactions for various API endpoints related to officers in a business loan application system.

classes.name: test_officer_controller_webmvc_test
classes.description: JUnit test class for OfficerController API endpoints with mock security and services, testing access control, response content, and side effects.

methods.name: queue_withoutJwt_is401
methods.description: Tests that a GET request to /api/officer/queue without a JWT returns 401 Unauthorized.

methods.name: queue_withApplicantRole_is403
methods.description: Tests that a GET request with an 'APPLICANT' role returns 403 Forbidden.

methods.name: queue_withOfficerRole_is200
methods.description: Tests that a GET request with a 'LOAN_OFFICER' role returns 200 OK and the expected queue list.

methods.name: auditQuery_sortsDesc_capsSize
methods.description: Verifies that the audit query endpoint sorts results descending by createdAt and caps the size to 200.

methods.name: auditQuery_invalidTimestamp_is400
methods.description: Checks that providing an invalid timestamp parameter returns a 400 Bad Request with an error message.

methods.name: overrideDecision_passesCorrelationId
methods.description: Validates that the override decision request passes correlation ID and other headers correctly, and the service method is invoked accordingly.
